name: codex-apple-plugin
description: Local Codex plugin for Apple Mail, Calendar, and Reminders workflows.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:mcp && swift build --package-path plugins/apple-productivity/swift && npm run build:calendar-helper && npm run build:reminders-helper
scripts.build:calendar-helper: rm -rf plugins/apple-productivity/dist/calendar/CalendarHelper.app && mkdir -p plugins/apple-productivity/dist/calendar/CalendarHelper.app/Contents/MacOS && cp plugins/apple-productivity/helpers/calendar-helper-info.plist plugins/apple-productivity/dist/calendar/CalendarHelper.app/Contents/Info.plist && xcrun swiftc -framework AppKit -framework EventKit -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker plugins/apple-productivity/helpers/calendar-helper-info.plist plugins/apple-productivity/helpers/calendar-tool.swift -o plugins/apple-productivity/dist/calendar/CalendarHelper.app/Contents/MacOS/calendar-helper && cp plugins/apple-productivity/dist/calendar/CalendarHelper.app/Contents/MacOS/calendar-helper plugins/apple-productivity/dist/calendar/calendar-helper && codesign --force --sign - --entitlements plugins/apple-productivity/helpers/eventkit-helper-entitlements.plist plugins/apple-productivity/dist/calendar/CalendarHelper.app
scripts.build:reminders-helper: rm -rf plugins/apple-productivity/dist/reminders/RemindersHelper.app && mkdir -p plugins/apple-productivity/dist/reminders/RemindersHelper.app/Contents/MacOS && cp plugins/apple-productivity/src/reminders/reminders-helper-info.plist plugins/apple-productivity/dist/reminders/RemindersHelper.app/Contents/Info.plist && xcrun swiftc -framework EventKit -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker plugins/apple-productivity/src/reminders/reminders-helper-info.plist plugins/apple-productivity/src/reminders/remindersHelper.swift -o plugins/apple-productivity/dist/reminders/RemindersHelper.app/Contents/MacOS/reminders-helper && cp plugins/apple-productivity/dist/reminders/RemindersHelper.app/Contents/MacOS/reminders-helper plugins/apple-productivity/dist/reminders/reminders-helper && codesign --force --sign - --entitlements plugins/apple-productivity/helpers/eventkit-helper-entitlements.plist plugins/apple-productivity/dist/reminders/RemindersHelper.app
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
